summary: Parses a POSIX-style filesystem string into root, directory, filename, extension, and stem components.
signature_intent: Accepts a validated string and returns an object with string fields: root, dir, base, ext, and name.
behavior: Recognizes only forward slash as a directory separator.
Treats a leading forward slash as an absolute root.
Ignores trailing separators when determining the final file component.
Sets base to the final non-separator component.
Sets name to base without the final extension when an extension is present.
Sets ext to the final dot segment of the final component when it qualifies as an extension.
Sets dir to the containing directory, excluding the final separator.
Returns empty strings for components that are not present.
edge_cases: Empty input returns all fields as empty strings.
Root-only input returns root and dir as slash with empty base, ext, and name.
Inputs ending in separators are parsed as if those trailing separators were absent.
A final component of only dots does not produce an extension.
A hidden-name style final component such as a single leading dot without another stem character does not produce an extension.
Relative inputs with no directory leave root and dir empty.
